SyncState.title: SyncState
SyncState.description: The unified state document containing all application data synchronized in real-time.

users.description: A map of username to user details (role, password, name, etc.).

orders.description: Active orders or warehouse deficit requests.

orderIdCounter.description: Counter for generating unique order IDs.

returnIdCounter.description: Counter for generating unique return IDs.

savedItemsCatalog.description: An array of saved items names for autocompletion.

/sync/{syncId}.description: Document holding the real-time shared state.
